scope: fresh-seed read-only geometry decomposition after G4 stopped event-balanced training; no model training, optimizer, parameter mutation, feature fitting, checkpoint selection, blind-seed reuse, formal validation, or test access
scientific_question: when a wrong return probe locally rejects stronger transport, is the cause downstream content recall failure, a wrong archival context value, conflict with another query sharing the same transport event, or the local scalar interpolation geometry
audited_model_state: the exact step-0 M1j initialization from the frozen M1j pilot; the trained M1j checkpoint is not loaded
reference_model: zero-added-parameter M1f converted from the frozen M1b slow weights with content covariance ridge 0.001; used only to emit earlier reference contexts

probe_credit.loss: one unreduced sensory cross-entropy per return-conflict probe
probe_credit.parameter_scope: step-0 final transport Linear(8,1) weight and bias, exactly 9 dimensions
probe_credit.causal_event_scope: history-available proposals in the same episode, final return segment, at or before the probe

query_only_correct_context_oracle.reference: the exact frozen M1f context at the matching earlier reference query
query_only_correct_context_oracle.intervention: replace M1j context only at the one currently evaluated return-conflict query; preserve the normal context trajectory and every other query
query_only_correct_context_oracle.purpose: test whether correct query address/context is sufficient without changing earlier writes or another probe

within_episode_pair.pairing: the two return-conflict probes from the same episode
within_episode_pair.gradient_cosine: cosine between their two 9-dimensional probe CE gradients
within_episode_pair.event_overlap: Jaccard overlap between their causal final-segment proposal times
within_episode_pair.shared_conflict_contract: one support and one reject label, gradient cosine at most -0.5, and causal event Jaccard at least 0.5

reject_category_contract.source_correct_saturation: the local credit rejects stronger transport but the normal probe is already correct
reject_category_contract.downstream_content_recall_failure: the normal probe is wrong, its local credit rejects transport, and the query-only exact correct-context oracle remains wrong
reject_category_contract.archival_context_value_wrong: the exact correct-context oracle fixes the reject probe, but the last causal archival history context does not prefer the correct over wrong reference
reject_category_contract.shared_scalar_transport_conflict: the oracle fixes the reject probe, its archival context pair is correct, and the same episode contains a support probe satisfying the frozen shared-conflict gradient and event-overlap thresholds
reject_category_contract.local_transport_geometry_mismatch: the oracle fixes the reject probe and archival value is pair-correct, but no frozen shared-event conflict explains why infinitesimal scalar transport is locally harmful

prohibited_operations: using G3 seed17181, G4 seed18182, or M1j blind seed16180
feeding room, segment, return, target, position, place, correctness, or oracle metadata into any model forward
post_result_rule: classify once with frozen category priority and thresholds; do not tune on seed19184; any model change requires a new protocol and new train, monitor, and blind seeds
